Why NepaKanvas

Built around the craft.

Handmade

Every stroke is painted by hand — no prints, no shortcuts.

Premium Materials

Cotton canvas, archival acrylics, hardwood easels.

Custom Orders

Send any photo or idea and we'll craft it for you.

Nationwide Delivery

Carefully packed, shipped across Nepal.

Secure Payments

eSewa, Khalti, bank transfer — all supported.

Professional Artists

A small team with years of portrait experience.

What we do

Services, with care.

Originals, commissions, live event painting and classes — all under one studio.

Canvas Art

Mini and large format originals, ready to hang.

Learn more

Wall Painting

Residential, commercial, hotels & restaurants.

Learn more

Wedding Live Painting

Live ceremony, engagement, anniversary memories.

Learn more

Custom Orders

Send a photo — we'll turn it into a painting.

Learn more

Our team

The hands behind the work.

Suresh Sirmal.

Lead Artist & Founder

Portrait & canvas specialist with 8+ years of studio practice.

Mira Thakuri.

Wall Art Director

Large-scale murals for hotels, cafés and residences across the valley.

Ayan R.

Live Event Painter

Wedding & ceremony live paintings, delivered on the same day.

Words from clients

Loved across Nepal.

One canvas at a time

Ready to transform
your space?

From a single mini canvas to a full wall — let's make something you'll keep forever.

Where ideas become art. Handcrafted canvas paintings, portraits, wall art and live event painting — made with care in Nepal.
